claim_boundary: Current evidence covers provider-neutral fully synthetic source universe, ResearchOperation, and correction paths only. No real private read, ResearchGuard execution, release check, GitHub action, or publication occurred.

model_gate.claim_boundary: G2 validates M0/C1-C12 product receipts and A0/A1/A2/A3 operation receipts from separate evidence roots. A pass in one plane never substitutes for the other.

fixture.claim_boundary: This inventory is fully synthetic and proves only declared case coverage; it does not prove provider access or runtime conformance.

optional_jira_dormant.claim_boundary: The source-only optional Jira adapter contains no embedded network client and is not activated or required by v0.2.

public_boundary.claim_boundary: This check enforces authoritative required-public inventory reconciliation, ignored/tracked/package/clean-clone accounting, missing and unexpected package payload rejection, package member path and generated-text privacy scanning, external private-root placement, link and junction rejection, portable evidence paths, decoded JSON/YAML and encoded-path scanning, size limits, non-synthetic email and structured opaque Gmail identifier rejection, and high-confidence secret patterns. No-commit, clean-clone-not-supplied, package-not-supplied, and unreviewed ACL/encryption/cloud-sync dispositions remain visible and are not claimed as passed release evidence.
